      ReliaQuest Tampa, FL

      New to LinkedIn? Join now

      Why it’s worth it:

      Joining our team means immersing yourself in a dynamic, collaborative environment where creativity thrives. You'll work alongside talented designers, videographers, and web developers, contributing to projects that span print, digital, animation and large-scale events. As part of an integrated marketing team, you'll be empowered to grow both personally and professionally in a company that values and supports a growth mindset. Most importantly, you'll have the opportunity to make a meaningful impact to a company that is working to solve some of the most complex challenges in the cybersecurity industry, driving innovation in a field that truly matters.

       

      The everyday hustle:

      • Develop and execute creative designs for a variety of mediums, with a strong focus on digital assets (social media, websites, email campaigns, etc.)
      • Develop brand assets to continue to strengthen and bring consistency to the ReliaQuest brand.
      • Design motion concepts, storyboards, and animatics that support user flows and brand messaging
      • Work closely with the marketing, content, and product teams to understand project requirements and deliver creative solutions.
      • Brainstorm and develop unique, on-brand design concepts for campaigns, projects, and events.
      • Stay up-to-date with design trends, tools, and best practices to keep our visuals fresh and engaging.


      Do you have what it takes?

      • Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Arts, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
      • 1–4+ years of professional graphic design experience (agency and/or in-house)
      • Strong portfolio demonstrating brand systems, campaigns, and real-world execution across channels
      • Experience owning projects end-to-end (concept → design → production → delivery)
      • Proficiency in industry-standard design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, etc.) and Figma.
      • Expert-level layout, typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy
      • Proven ability to develop/extend brand identities and create cohesive visual systems
      • Strong conceptual thinking: can generate multiple directions and justify design decisions
      • Experience with After Effects and export workflows for web including Lottie animations


       

      What makes you uncommon?

      • Experience leading other designers and giving constructive feedback
      • Strong communication skills with stakeholders (marketing, product, sales, leadership)
      • Comfortable presenting work, handling critique, and iterating quickly
      • Ability to manage timelines, prioritize, and handle multiple projects simultaneously
      • Familiarity with creative briefs, brand guidelines, and campaign workflows
      • Strong attention to detail and consistency at scale
      • Understanding of marketing channels (social, email, web, ads, events) and designing for each
      • Experience animating for product onboarding, interactive storytelling, or data visualization
      • Basic sound design or video editing (Premiere, Audition, etc.)

      • Seniority level

        Entry level

      • Employment type

        Full-time

      • Job function

        Design, Art/Creative, and Information Technology

      • Industries

        Computer and Network Security

      Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at ReliaQuest by 2x
